display_text: Chaos Knight Aghanim's Scepter: Creates an illusion of allied heroes globally and an additional illusion for Chaos Knight. This significantly enhances Chaos Knight's split-push and teamfight presence by overwhelming enemies with illusions, countering their ability to focus fire effectively.
search_text: Chaos Knight Aghanim Scepter split-push teamfight anti-focus fire illusion clone global

display_text: Chaos Knight Aghanim's Shard: Chaos Bolt creates a Phantasm illusion to attack the target, dealing reduced damage. This adds consistent extra damage in skirmishes and counters enemy squishy targets by forcing them to deal with additional threats.
search_text: Chaos Knight Aghanim Shard skirmish anti-squishy Phantasm illusion reduced damage
